title: leucanthemum legraeanum
intro: Leucanthemum legraeanum, also known as the Pyrethrum or Pyrethrum Daisy, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to produce pyrethrum, a natural insecticide that has been used for centuries to repel mosquitoes and other pests. Leucanthemum legraeanum has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
